overview.description: The Franklin New York Municipal Income ETF (FTNY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF investing in New York municipal bonds. The fund targets bonds with maturities of three years or longer FTNY was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
